name: bbg-peptides
description: BBG Peptides — group-buy e-commerce (React + Express + Supabase Postgres, deploys to Vercel)

scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,client -c green,blue "npm run dev --prefix server" "npm run dev --prefix client"
scripts.db:setup: npm run db:push --prefix server && npm run db:seed --prefix server
